subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-20
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! That this city is progressive; that it is adorned with the existence of the believers... The deceased, his honor Mr. Chase, was a blessed soul; he was a holy reality.
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @eulogies; reminiscences
